description.en: Attacks all enemies and inflicts <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Attack</color> and <color=#28d9ed>Cursed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하여 <color=#28d9ed>공격력 감소</color> 및 <color=#28d9ed>저주</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color>동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>攻撃力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせ、<color=#28d9ed>呪い</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,造成<color=#28d9ed>攻击力降低</color>和<color=#28d9ed>诅咒</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
